arts.ttl: Leicester officials fly out to seal January signing of 23-year-old ace
arts.sum: Leicester City are keen on signing the AC Milan midfielder Strahinja Pavlovic. According to a report from Calciomercato via FoxesofLeicster, officials from the English club are in Milan to push through a move for the 23-year-old defender. The player has been linked with a move to England in the past. arts.sum: Misfiring Tottenham Hotspur attacker Timo Werner - on loan from RB Leipzig - is reportedly being eyed up by MLS outfit New York Red Bulls.

arts.ttl: Leicester City star 'offered to Champions League club' as agent speaks out
arts.sum: However, since Ruud van Nistelrooy has come in, Okoli has been on the bench in five of the last eight Premier League matches and played just eight minutes in 2025. Okoli chose to come to England after the Foxes returned to the Premier League, signing a five-year contract under previous manager Steve Cooper.
